title: Labels + due-date combo
description: Probes the combined label-creation + label-application + due-date-setting flow across several tasks at once -- a common realistic ask that touches three different concepts in one request.
promptTemplate: Create a project called "{{prefix}}Sprint Tasks" with a label called "{{prefix}}urgent". Create 5 tasks in that project, each tagged with the "{{prefix}}urgent" label and due next Friday.
